issues.detail: Skill documentation does not cover error handling or edge cases for deployment and configuration.

scenarios.name: Deploy Loki and Promtail with Docker container discovery
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses docker_sd_configs with __meta_docker_container_name relabeling for automatic container labels; baseline typically falls back to static file paths or generic Docker logging drivers.

scenarios.name: LogQL queries for service error rate and p99 duration
scenarios.rationale: Treatment writes idiomatic LogQL with rate()/sum by() and quantile_over_time with unwrap on parsed JSON fields; baseline confuses PromQL/LogQL syntax and misses unwrap.
